The story is about a guy who has an accident and has experimental surgery.
Saves his life but now he sees everything as rotting flesh. Grotesque gore everywhere.

And somehow in that view of the MC he sees a girl that looks completely normal so she is like his only normalcy.

Dude falls in love, so does her, nsfw happens between story stuff. 
Turns out she is actually an alien or such.
If the MC were to get his normal vision back he will see a flesh blob instead of the girl he is in love with
I never see a wild story like this beside that company collab with a tower defense game

content: Personally, I picked Thais, Hameln, Tawil, and Myriam. Ofc, you should look into some guides.

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:


- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University
- [Damage Formula](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1384463374213189652) by Jynn             
- [How To Aliemus 101 & 102](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1387172781829128304) by Jynn  
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431) by Cheri
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
- [Compilation of guide videos](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bnnR--yNl6r5cMljPoEF4bXC9HIoSK_WNUG7ucYGO6A/edit?usp=sharing>) by Kaly
